meaning: adj.涓嶆垚鐔熺殑,鏈畬鍏ㄥ彂灞曠殑
examples: He said that we were emotionally immature.
His speech is immature, his vocabulary limited.
HIV, because the lining of the neck of an immature womb is less tough.
Perhaps the biggest problem facing IT today is that its accounting practices are substantially immature.
